name: Italian Pot Roast
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub the roast with salt.
2. In a Dutch oven, brown the roast in oil.
3. Add all remaining ingredients except noodles.
4. Bring to a boil; reduce heat and simmer, covered, for 2-3 hours or until meat is tender.
5. Discard onion.
6. Remove roast; cut into slices.
7. Serve over noodles with gravy.
8. Yield: 8-10 servings.
